description: Four production microservice containers (acme-cache-warmer, acme-event-processor, acme-report-generator, acme-static-server) are crashing immediately upon startup. Diagnose the entrypoint script failures and fix the entrypoint scripts or Dockerfiles in ~/projects/acme-services/ to resolve the errors. Rebuild each image with the same tag and successfully start all four containers. Write a debugging report to ~/Desktop/debugging_report.txt describing the root cause and fix for each service.
